count_state.note: TLT has no independent bootstrap; it mechanically inherits TLT_LONG's primary-degree anchor (1987, 2020) per dashboard_build_spec.md §2/§8, regenerated every build run and never hand-edited. 1 anchor label(s) fall within TLT's own history (starts 2002-07-30) and are substituted in own_anchor_substitutions below.

lenses.name: hurst_underlying_trend
lenses.reason: Hickson underlying-trend vote across cycles longer than 80D (20W:down, 40W:down, 18M:down, 54M:down, 9Y:down, 18Y:down): normalized=-1.00 (6 cycle(s) counted)

lenses.name: dow_theory
lenses.reason: ^DJI last low 45057.28 @ 2026-03-30 (down) vs ^DJT last low 19504.20 @ 2026-05-14 (up) -- diverging, medium scale

lenses.name: mcclellan_summation
lenses.reason: Summation Index now 1955.1 vs neutral 1000 (neutral-zone); votes only at the +2000/-1000 thresholds, no decision in between

lenses.name: fld_ah_80d
lenses.reason: 80D FLD A-H category F (genuine), bias=bearish

lenses.name: fld_ah_40w
lenses.reason: 40W FLD A-H category B (tracking), bias=neutral

lenses.name: ew_fib_slow
lenses.reason: Intermediate degree wave_5_extension: anchor 2015-03-06 @ 122.97, projected target 147.16 (wave-5 target generalizes Ch.8's wave-3 rule)

lenses.name: ew_fib_medium
lenses.reason: Minor degree wave_5_extension: anchor 2024-03-07 @ 96.40, projected target 84.31 (wave-5 target generalizes Ch.8's wave-3 rule)

lenses.name: ew_fib_micro
lenses.reason: Minute degree wave_5_extension: anchor 2026-04-13 @ 86.25, projected target 89.02 (wave-5 target generalizes Ch.8's wave-3 rule)

lenses.name: ew_fib_corrective_slow
lenses.reason: no in-progress A-B correction at Intermediate degree to project C from

lenses.name: ew_fib_corrective_medium
lenses.reason: no in-progress A-B correction at Minor degree to project C from

lenses.name: ew_fib_corrective_micro
lenses.reason: no in-progress A-B correction at Minute degree to project C from

lenses.name: circular_arc
lenses.reason: no forward projection from the current pivot triple

lenses.name: rsi_reversal
lenses.reason: no RSI/price divergence in the current confirmed-pivot triple

lenses.name: vtl
lenses.reason: most recently confirmed higher-degree turn: peak of 2026-02-27, confirmed 2026-03-13 (medium scale)

lenses.name: ferrera_composite
lenses.reason: DTF 16-cycle composite net vote=4 at build date (table locked May 2002)

lenses.name: kst_long_term
lenses.reason: monthly KST (dominant 24-mo ROC, computed on TLT_LONG): kst=-53.6 vs signal MA=-49.9, last cross 2026-07-13, partial/running period

lenses.name: kst_short_term
lenses.reason: daily KST (dominant 30-d ROC, computed on TLT): kst=2.0 vs signal MA=12.0, last cross 2026-07-07

lenses.name: rsi_14
lenses.reason: 14-day RSI=34.2 vs its own 50 midline (Wilder; Murphy p.245), last cross 2026-07-01

lenses.name: macd
lenses.reason: MACD(12,26,9)=-0.35 vs signal=-0.05 (Appel; Murphy p.253) -- below zero, last cross 2026-07-01

lenses.name: stochastic_14
lenses.reason: slow Stochastics %K=7.8 vs %D=8.2 (Lane; Murphy p.247) -- oversold, last cross 2026-07-13

lenses.name: rsi_range_rule
lenses.reason: 14-day RSI=34.2, bear range (Cardwell Range Rules; Grafton Ch.8) -- holding its own 60 resistance; last range shift to bear on 2026-07-07

lenses.name: open_arms
lenses.reason: 10-day Open Arms Index=1.09 (Arms; Murphy p.446), inside the neutral 0.70-1.20 band -- no signal

lenses.name: breadth_confirmation
lenses.reason: DJI:down, GSPC:up, IXIC:up, IWM:up -- 3 up / 1 down, NOT unanimous (diverging)

lenses.name: putcall_sentiment
lenses.reason: $CPC=0.61 (Murphy p.178-179), 0th percentile of 5 days own history -- not at an extreme, no signal

lenses.name: breadth_ad_line
lenses.reason: NYSE A/D line 582216 vs its own 200-day MA 573998 (Pring ch.28 checkpoint #7)

lenses.name: comparative_spine_lqd
lenses.reason: TLT/LQD (LQD = Investment Grade Corporate Bonds): TLT -2.3% / ratio -0.4% from 2026-06-11 to 2026-07-13 (20 sessions) -- aligned; credit-quality preference read (government vs. duration-matched investment-grade corporate), never a market-direction vote

lenses.name: comparative_spine_hyg
lenses.reason: TLT/HYG (HYG = High Yield Corporate Bonds): TLT -2.3% / ratio -1.8% from 2026-06-11 to 2026-07-13 (20 sessions) -- aligned; risk-on/risk-off read (safe long treasuries vs. risky high-yield credit), never a market-direction vote

lenses.name: comparative_spine_gld
lenses.reason: TLT/GLD (GLD = Gold): TLT -2.3% / ratio +2.8% from 2026-06-11 to 2026-07-13 (20 sessions) -- diverging; real-yield/inflation-expectations read (gold vs. nominal long treasuries), never a market-direction vote

lenses.name: comparative_spine_dxy
lenses.reason: TLT/DXY (DXY = US Dollar Index): TLT -2.3% / ratio -3.7% from 2026-06-11 to 2026-07-13 (20 sessions) -- aligned; cross-asset macro/rate-differential read, never a market-direction vote

lenses.name: comparative_spine_ief
lenses.reason: TLT/IEF (IEF = 7-10 Year Treasury Bonds): TLT -2.3% / ratio -1.2% from 2026-06-11 to 2026-07-13 (20 sessions) -- aligned; duration/curve-positioning read (20+yr long end vs. 7-10yr belly, both nominal US Treasuries), never a market-direction vote

lenses.name: gann_seasonal
lenses.reason: no active turn window; nearest seasonal date 2026-07-23 (1/3 year, +10d)

lenses.name: gann_time_price_balance
lenses.reason: no square currently; nearest is recent swing low 2026-05-19 -- 7.86wk elapsed vs 1.45% moved (diff +6.41, tolerance 2.0)

lenses.name: gann_price_levels
lenses.reason: not at a resistance level; nearest is current campaign's 1/8 level 83.7812 (2.3% of range away, tolerance 1.5%)

invalidation.basis: A confirmed close below the real 1987 low would invalidate the 'single Primary-degree advance 1987->2020' framing this bootstrap locks in.

breadth.nh_nl: 56 new highs / 16 new lows (net +40) as of 2026-07-10 -- stockcharts.com $NYHGH/$NYLOW Prev Close

seasonal.reason: no active turn window; nearest seasonal date 2026-07-23 (1/3 year, +10d)

time_price_balance.reason: no square currently; nearest is recent swing low 2026-05-19 -- 7.86wk elapsed vs 1.45% moved (diff +6.41, tolerance 2.0)

price_levels.reason: not at a resistance level; nearest is current campaign's 1/8 level 83.7812 (2.3% of range away, tolerance 1.5%)

pring_kst.lens_basis: TWO voting lenses: kst_long_term = monthly KST (dominant 24-mo ROC, ~half the ~4yr business cycle), anchored on TLT_LONG, vs its 9-month signal MA; kst_short_term = daily KST (dominant 30-day ROC) on TLT itself, vs its 10-day signal MA. Intermediate (weekly) KST is display-only, never votes -- see market_cycle_model.intermediate.
pring_kst.known_failure_mode: false bear signals during secular/linear uptrends (Pring 4th ed. p.241, his own Nikkei 1975-92 example); dominant spans assume the ~4-yr business cycle (long) or can lag a fast whipsaw (short)

trace.hurst: lib.hurst_overlay.build_hurst_overlay(TLT.json, 20D/40D/80D/20W/40W, origin_date=None -> each cycle's own earliest detected trough)
trace.hurst.underlying_trend: lib.hurst_fld.underlying_trend(TLT.json, cycle) per cycle -- Hickson Concept #10 time_translation nested inside; descriptive only (see MCCLELLAN_NARRATIVE_PROTOCOL.md §1)
trace.vtl: lib.vtl.confirmed_turns(TLT.json, scale='medium') -- also feeds the header's 'vtl' directional lens (most recently CONFIRMED higher-degree turn by confirmed_on: trough=up, peak=down, per MotiveWave pp.17-18)
trace.local_wave_counts: lib.ew_count.find_all_impulses(TLT.json, scale) for slow/medium/micro -- rule-validated, NOT the human-reviewed EW count; state='none' per-scale if nothing passes the 3 hard rules
trace.invalidation: counts/TLT.json invalidation (inherited from counts/TLT_LONG.json, TLT has none of its own)
trace.comparative_spine: lib.ratio.ratio_series/trend_divergence_flag/price_window on TLT vs LQD/HYG/GLD/DXY/IEF -- divergence flag computed on the FULL common history; the stored ratio series is sliced to the display window (payload only, not a signal change); price_window is the same trailing 20-session window the divergence flag reads, both instruments' own closes
trace.dow_theory: lib.dow_theory.confirm_state(DJI.json, DJT.json, scale=medium) -- market-wide, identical on every reference panel
trace.breadth: lib.breadth_calc.enrich(data/breadth/nyse.json) -- market-wide, identical on every reference panel
trace.breadth.nh_nl: fetch_nhnl.py: stockcharts.com $NYHGH/$NYLOW Prev Close (OCR, primary) cross-checked against barchart.com $MAHN/$MALN previousClose (plain JSON) -> data/breadth/nhnl.json, one trading day behind (see that script's docstring); falls back to a 'data pending' string if nhnl.json doesn't exist yet
trace.mcclellan: lib.mcclellan_summation on nyse.json summ_pub + TLT.json -- Summation itself is market-wide, the price target is instrument-specific
trace.mcclellan.patterns: lib.mcclellan_oscillator.classify(nyse.json mosc_pub, mcc_state, pivots_medium, summ_pivots, NEUTRAL) -- 'Patterns for Profit' descriptive classifier (triple top/bottom read on the Summation, not the Oscillator -- corrected after reading the book's own figure, see MCCLELLAN_NARRATIVE_PROTOCOL.md); NOT a backtested signal (TRIALS_LEDGER ID-004/006/009 NULL on related McClellan hypotheses)
trace.scenario_cone: repackaged directly from hurst_fld.forecast + mcclellan_summation forecast entries above -- no separate projection computed
trace.agreement.pivot_independence: distinct pivot SCALES (lib.pivots.SCALES / lib.hurst_fld.NOMINAL) actually feeding the directional lenses above
trace.jenkins.circular_arc: lib.circular_arcs.arc_from_pivots(TLT.json, 'medium') -- Jenkins 3-pivot circumcircle, ATR-normalized; directional lens = center-side structure read (center above all pivots = up-curving support rim = up); turn_date = arc-goes-vertical 3/9-o'clock timing (Geometry Fig 9); no price target by design -- both candidate price readings proved structurally unsound (spec §13)
trace.jenkins.fib_turn_cluster: lib.fib_time_clusters.forecast_turn_cluster(TLT.json, 'medium') -- strongest forward Fibonacci bar-count cluster (>=2 DISTINCT pivots converging); a turn DATE only, deliberately NOT a directional vote in the agreement score (a turn window has no direction; inventing one would fabricate data)
trace.gann.seasonal: lib.gann_seasonal.state(TLT.json bars, pivots_slow, build_date) -- W.D. Gann Master Stock Market Course Ch.5/17/18 fixed spring-anchored seasonal dates + Ch.7/10A 'most reliable' cycle-length anniversaries of this instrument's own all-time high/low and most recent slow-scale swing high/low; turn-WINDOW flag only, direction always None, same posture as jenkins.fib_turn_cluster -- joins the timing strip only while a window is currently active
trace.gann.time_price_balance: lib.gann_time_price_balance.state(TLT.json bars, pivots_slow, build_date) -- W.D. Gann Master Stock Market Course Ch.18 'Time and Price Balance' identity (weeks elapsed since a reference pivot numerically equals percent moved since that pivot, within TOLERANCE=2.0); turn-WINDOW flag only, direction always None, same posture as gann.seasonal -- joins the timing strip only while a square is currently active
trace.gann.price_levels: lib.gann_price_levels.state(TLT.json bars, pivots_slow) -- W.D. Gann Master Stock Market Course Ch.6/9 percentage resistance-level grid (1/8-1/2-7/8 fraction ladder) over the life-of-the-stock range and the current-campaign range; a static level read, direction always None, NOT date-shaped so it never joins the timing strip (unlike gann.seasonal / gann.time_price_balance above)
trace.ferrera.composite_state: lib.ferrera_composite.state(build_date) -- Ferrera DTF 16-cycle triangle-wave composite (table locked in print May 2002); directional lens = composite slope sign (net phase vote), omitted while flat; next_turn joins the timing strip at the source's own +/-6mo tolerance; market-wide/calendar-only, identical on every reference panel
trace.ferrera.benner: lib.benner_sequence.next_events(build_date) -- Benner year sequences (tops 8-9-10 from 1972, lows 7-11-9 from 1978, panics 16-18-20 from 1965); YEAR resolution timing markers only, never a directional vote; market-wide/calendar-only
trace.pring_kst: lib.kst.market_cycle_model(TLT.json, long_bars=TLT_LONG.json) -- Pring 4th ed. Table 12-1/12-2 (OCR-verified, see lib/kst.py grounding); header lenses 'kst_long_term' (monthly KST on TLT_LONG vs its 9-mo MA) and 'kst_short_term' (daily KST on TLT vs its 10-day MA), both state-until-crossed; intermediate (weekly) KST is display context only, never votes; newest point on every variant uses the RUNNING month/week/day close (partial_last_period flag carried), so a lens can move intra-period but history never repaints
trace.open_arms: lib.open_arms.state(data/breadth/nyse.json) -- Arms' Open Arms Index, adv/dec/upv/dnv each separately 10-day-smoothed then combined into one TRIN (Murphy Ch.18 p.446); market-wide, identical on every reference panel; header lens votes CONTRARIAN, only at Arms' own 1.20/0.70 extremes
trace.putcall_sentiment: lib.putcall_sentiment.state(data/sentiment/putcall.json) -- CBOE Total Put/Call Ratio ($CPC), Barchart primary + StockCharts OCR cross-check (Murphy Ch.7 pp.178-179); market-wide, identical on every reference panel; header lens votes CONTRARIAN, only at the 80th/20th percentile of the ratio's own history (this project's own threshold, not Murphy's number)
trace.breadth_confirmation: lib.breadth_confirmation.confirm_state(DJI/GSPC/IXIC/IWM.json, scale=medium) -- Murphy Ch.18 pp.449-450 'Comparing Market Averages'; market-wide, identical on every reference panel; a DIFFERENT technique from the dow_theory lens above despite the shared pivot mechanism (that one is specifically ^DJI vs ^DJT); header lens votes only when ALL resolvable series unanimously agree
trace.rsi_14: lib.oscillators.rsi_state(TLT.json) -- Wilder RSI (Murphy Ch.10 p.240, recursive smoothing per Wilder's own original book); header lens = RSI vs its own 50 midline (p.245)
trace.macd: lib.oscillators.macd_state(TLT.json) -- Appel MACD(12,26,9) EMA (Murphy Ch.10 p.253); header lens = MACD line vs signal line crossover
trace.stochastic_14: lib.oscillators.stochastic_state(TLT.json) -- Lane slow Stochastics %K/%D, 14-period (Murphy Ch.10 p.247); header lens = slow %K vs slow %D crossover, the book's own stated preference over fast stochastics
trace.rsi_range_rule: lib.rsi_range_rules.range_rule_state(TLT.json) -- Cardwell RSI Range Rules (Grafton, 'Mastering Hurst Cycle Analysis' Ch.8): bull range (RSI 40-80) vs bear range (RSI 20-60), state-until-reversed on a genuine 40/60 boundary break; SAME underlying RSI series as rsi_14 above, shares its scale tag rather than claiming independent pivot-independence
trace.rsi_reversal: lib.rsi_reversal.reversal_from_pivots(TLT.json, 'medium') -- Cardwell Positive/Negative Reversal pattern (Grafton Ch.8): RSI/price divergence across the last 3 confirmed pivots (x,z,y), same non-repainting detector as circular_arc/vtl above; header lens = pattern direction when active, projected target carried in reason text; also a registered PRICE-harness forecaster (run_backtest.py, rsi_reversal_medium)
trace.ew_fib_slow: lib.ew_fib_targets.target_from_forming(local_wave_counts['slow']) -- Elliott Wave Fibonacci retracement/extension target (Grafton Ch.8), Intermediate degree; pure consumer of ew_count.py's own forming-impulse hypothesis, never touches the classifier; also a registered PRICE-harness forecaster at the 'medium' scale only (run_backtest.py, ew_fib_medium)
trace.ew_fib_medium: lib.ew_fib_targets.target_from_forming(local_wave_counts['medium']) -- Elliott Wave Fibonacci retracement/extension target (Grafton Ch.8), Minor degree; pure consumer of ew_count.py's own forming-impulse hypothesis, never touches the classifier; also a registered PRICE-harness forecaster (run_backtest.py, ew_fib_medium)
trace.ew_fib_micro: lib.ew_fib_targets.target_from_forming(local_wave_counts['micro']) -- Elliott Wave Fibonacci retracement/extension target (Grafton Ch.8), Minute degree; pure consumer of ew_count.py's own forming-impulse hypothesis, never touches the classifier
trace.ew_fib_corrective_slow: lib.ew_fib_targets.target_from_forming_corrective(local_wave_counts['slow']) -- Elliott Wave corrective (zigzag) C-projection (Grafton Ch.8), Intermediate degree; pure consumer of ew_count.py's own forming_corrective hypothesis, never touches the classifier; also a registered PRICE-harness forecaster at the 'medium' scale only (run_backtest.py, ew_fib_corrective_medium)
trace.ew_fib_corrective_medium: lib.ew_fib_targets.target_from_forming_corrective(local_wave_counts['medium']) -- Elliott Wave corrective (zigzag) C-projection (Grafton Ch.8), Minor degree; pure consumer of ew_count.py's own forming_corrective hypothesis, never touches the classifier; also a registered PRICE-harness forecaster (run_backtest.py, ew_fib_corrective_medium)
trace.ew_fib_corrective_micro: lib.ew_fib_targets.target_from_forming_corrective(local_wave_counts['micro']) -- Elliott Wave corrective (zigzag) C-projection (Grafton Ch.8), Minute degree; pure consumer of ew_count.py's own forming_corrective hypothesis, never touches the classifier
trace.intermarket_correlation: lib.intermarket_correlation.state(TLT.json, CL.json) -- Murphy Ch.17 pp.428-429; rolling Pearson correlation of daily % returns over a trailing 63-session window; a relationship read, NEVER a directional vote -- not in the agreement header at all
